other_observers: Brian Gibbons, Mark Peterson, Bill Maynard; found and banded by Brian Gibbons. Seen later in the day by Norm Erthal, Steve Stachowiak, and perhaps others.
description: Empidonax flycatcher with very green head and back, dark wings with two whiteish/yellowish wing bars. Yellow throat, yellow underparts, yellowish eye ring.Behaviors: Photographed in the hand, and seen high up in the trees above the banding station at Chico Basin Ranch.Call: nonePlumage: adult
